summary: Static code review for tab bar styling changes in React Native/Expo app. All requirements verified: tab bar uses backgroundGradient[2] as backgroundColor, no borderRadius or shadow properties present for seamless blend effect.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Tab bar uses backgroundGradient[2] (darkest stop) - Line 20: navBarColor = themeColors.backgroundGradient[2], Line 50: backgroundColor: navBarColor
VERIFIED: No borderTopLeftRadius/borderTopRightRadius on tab bar container - Style block (lines 44-51) contains only position, bottom, left, right, backgroundColor
VERIFIED: No shadow properties on tab bar container - No shadowColor, shadowOffset, shadowOpacity, shadowRadius, or elevation present
VERIFIED: TypeScript compilation passes - Only pre-existing CSS import warning (unrelated to this change)
